ABOUT_SECTION.SUBTITLE: Who I Am
ABOUT_SECTION.TITLE: About me
ABOUT_SECTION.TEXT: My name is Temirlan and I am originally from Russia. I currently live in Hagen, Germany. I have been interested in the IT field from an early age and developed a strong desire to work in this area. Due to various life circumstances, I was not able to pursue this path at first. I am currently enrolled in an online training program at the Developer Akademie, where I continuously expand my knowledge in web development. I enjoy programming and like learning new technologies. What motivates me most is the opportunity to turn my own ideas into functional applications and continuously improve my skills.
ABOUT_SECTION.FEATURE_1: I am currently living in Hagen, Germany. I am open to remote work and also willing to relocate, even to another country.
ABOUT_SECTION.FEATURE_2: Yes, I enjoy learning new things and improving my skills. I learn through courses, practice, and working on projects. In the beginning, it can be challenging, but with time, focus, and dedication, I am able to understand and make progress. This process motivates me to keep growing and becoming better.
ABOUT_SECTION.FEATURE_3: When I face a problem, I first analyze it and try to understand what is going wrong. It does not always work on the first try, but I keep going. I test different solutions and do not give up, even when it is difficult. I also search for answers online and ask colleagues when needed. I believe that making mistakes is part of the learning process, and I improve by learning from them. What inspires me in programming is the ability to create something from scratch and see real results from the code I write.

SKILLS_SECTION.SUBTITLE: Technologies
SKILLS_SECTION.TITLE: Skill Set
SKILLS_SECTION.TEXT: I have experience working with front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, SCSS, and Angular. I also use GitHub for version control and project management. I am highly motivated to continue learning and expanding my skill set. In the future, I plan to learn more programming languages and deepen my knowledge by moving into backend development. I understand that web development is constantly evolving, and I believe it is very important to keep up with new technologies and trends. That is why I am always open to learning and improving my skills.
SKILLS_SECTION.QUESTION: You need
SKILLS_SECTION.DESCRIPTION: Feel free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge.
SKILLS_SECTION.TOOLTIP: I have a special interest in learning

PORTFOLIO.SUBTITLE: Portfolio
PORTFOLIO.TITLE: Featured Projects
PORTFOLIO.DESCRIPTION: Explore a selection of my work here - interact with projects to see my skills in action

JOIN.DESCRIPTION: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

POLLO.DESCRIPTION: Jump, run and throw game based on object-oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and tabasco salsa to fight against the crazy hen.

DABUBBLE.DESCRIPTION: This App is a Slack Clone App. It revolutionizes team communication and collaboration with its intuitive interface, real-time messaging, and robust channel organization.

CONTACT.TEXT: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work.
